body.title: Re-run the DS.0 observe on T-reorg-parents-path-sweep after num_ctx fix (confirm-by)
body.intention: I intend that we empirically confirm the num_ctx/context fix unblocks DS.0 before judging its coding capability or moving to the listener/prompt work.
body.description:
**Problem:** this is the confirm-by for D-ds-inference-context-management. The 2026-07-03 baseline observe (controlled direct fire: INFERENCE_ENDPOINT=http://10.0.0.100:11434, dev._fetch_ticket + dev._run_inference, dual git push-guards, reset to PRE) produced 0 Edit/Write across 114 tool calls and died at a ~32K turn-39 timeout — the model worked blind.
**Proposed shape:** after T-ollama-source-set-num-ctx ships, re-run the SAME controlled observe on T-reorg-parents-path-sweep and capture whether devstral now sees the ticket, emits Edit/Write, and reaches test/close. Compare against the baseline.
**Affected files:** none (observation; reuses the scratchpad fire script + git push-guards).
**Design rules:** proof-on-close (this run is evidence, not a close-by-assertion).
**Scope boundary:** IN — re-run + capture findings, diff against the 2026-07-03 baseline (0 edits, turn-39 timeout). OUT — fixing whatever new failure the re-run surfaces (file follow-ups then).
**Test plan:** no code tests — the observe log IS the evidence. PASS signal = >=1 AgenticLoop Edit/Write call AND no silent truncation (prompt within num_ctx) AND the run advances past explore.
**Completion criteria:** a re-run log is captured and the num_ctx hypothesis is annotated confirmed or falsified against the baseline.
**Rollback:** n/a (observation only).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: OBSERVE RE-RUN COMPLETE (2026-07-04, devstral-small-2:24b@Hex, $0, num_ctx=32768 live). RESULT vs baseline (07-03): num_ctx was NECESSARY-BUT-NOT-SUFFICIENT. (1) CRASH FIXED: attempt ran a FULL 50 turns at flat ~13-16s/turn cadence with NO turn-39 timeout cliff — the silent-truncation death-mode is GONE (baseline died at turn 39 with a 120s timeout). (2) EDITS STILL ABSENT: 45 Read + 8 Bash + 0 Write/Edit across the whole 50-turn attempt — same read-only-wandering as baseline, model never converged explore->edit. So num_ctx alone does NOT unblock editing on this multi-site-judgment ticket. (3) IDENTICAL-RETRY + MISCLASSIFICATION CONFIRMED LIVE: on hitting the turn-50 cap the domain loop logged retry=1/2 reason=availability and restarted the identical 50-turn path — AND it MISCLASSIFIES 'hit turn cap' as 'availability'. REPRIORITIZE: T-agentic-loop-context-discipline is now the PRIME suspect (re-dumping full files each turn churns context so the model never accumulates a plan -> never edits); T-ds-loop-no-identical-retry-honest-escalate validated + must also fix cap!=availability. Evidence: scratchpad/ds0_rerun_numctx.log (~680 lines, session-temp). Guards used+restored, tree clean at f638471e.
body.unproven_reason: Observation ticket — the run log IS the evidence; there is no red->green proof form for a live observe (same class as refactor-can't-prove). Hypothesis PARTIALLY FALSIFIED: num_ctx fixed the crash, not the edits.
